pageContext.name: Tyrant Mecha 01
pageContext.description: Sideshow and JoyToy are excited to present the Tyrant Mecha 01 Collectible Figure!  This 1:18 Scale Battle for the Stars figure has multiple points of articulation and stands at 12.99' tall. It also comes with extra accessories.  Don't miss your chance to add this figure to your Battle for the Stars collection today!
